---
title: &TITLE "Matthias Baumann"
last: Baumann
first: Matthias
people_group: "gradstudent"
email: "matthias.baumann1@rwth-aachen.de"
education:
  - "M.Sc. Chemistry (Grade 1.5) | RWTH Aachen University | 2024 <br> B.Sc. Chemistry (Grade 2.2) | Universität Tübingen | 2020"
subtitle: "PhD Student"
description: ""
image: avatar.png
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:matthias.baumann1@rwth-aachen.de
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: ../../CVs/CV_MB.pdf
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

Matthias is a PhD student in the STREAM Group. His Master's thesis at RWTH Aachen focused on the development and application of ab initio neural network potentials for the simulation of the thermodynamics and kinetics of photoresponsive materials (Grade 1.0). His background spans computational chemistry, spectroscopy, and catalysis.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

:::
